smart_pressure.name: SMART PRESSURE
smart_pressure.description: Sanctions + Diplomacy: Sanctions effectiveness +25%, diplomatic overtures carry more weight.
smart_pressure.flavor: Iran knows the stick is real. The carrot becomes more appealing.

iron_curtain.name: IRON CURTAIN
iron_curtain.description: Naval Patrol + Carrier Group: Intercept chance +15%, combined naval presence creates impenetrable screen.
iron_curtain.flavor: Nothing gets through the strait without your permission.

hearts_and_minds.name: HEARTS AND MINDS
hearts_and_minds.description: Humanitarian Aid + Media Campaign: Standing +3/day, approval +2/day, significant budget drain.
hearts_and_minds.flavor: The world sees America at its best. Your accountants see the bill.

shadow_war.name: SHADOW WAR
shadow_war.description: Cyber Operations + Intelligence Surge: Intel generation doubled, fog reduction doubled. If discovered: massive credibility hit.
shadow_war.flavor: The invisible war. Devastating when it works. Career-ending when it doesn't.

fortress_america.name: FORTRESS AMERICA
fortress_america.description: Missile Defense + Troop Surge: Deterrence +10, tension -5 (defensive posture reads as non-provocative).
fortress_america.flavor: A wall of steel that says "we're not here to attack — we're here to stay."

diplomatic_blitz.name: DIPLOMATIC BLITZ
diplomatic_blitz.description: UN Engagement + Allied Coordination: DipCapital generation +50%, UN events succeed more often.
diplomatic_blitz.flavor: The diplomatic machine runs at full speed. But military flexibility suffers.

maximum_pressure.name: MAXIMUM PRESSURE
maximum_pressure.description: Sanctions + Carrier Group + Cyber Ops: Iran economy squeezed, faction balance shifts toward moderates. But tension rises.
maximum_pressure.flavor: Every lever pulled at once. Iran feels the pressure from all sides. International fatigue sets in after 10 days.
